title: Chandelier
why_this_song: Chandelier by Sia (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 16 times; first heard in: "'Cause I'm just holding on for tonight"
Appears 13 times; first heard in: "But I'm holding on for dear life"
Appears 12 times; first heard in: "One, two, three, one, two, three, drink"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I'm gonna swing from the chandelier"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Won't look down, won't open my eyes"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: 'Cause I'm just holding on for tonight

Won't look down, won't open my eyes
Keep my glass full until morning light
One, two, three, one, two, three, drink

One, two, three, one, two, three, drink

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "tonight" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "tonight" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "holding" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "holding" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Won't look down, won't open my eyes
Feel my tears as they dry

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Can't feel anything, when will I learn?
Sun is up, I'm a mess
But I'm holding on for dear life

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Chandelier" was released in 2014. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Chandelier" foi lançada em 2014. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Chandelier" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Chandelier" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
